Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPEDIDOVENDADESPACHO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO &PedStsDsp = nullvalue(&PedStsDsp) &PedBlq = nullvalue(&PedBlq) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Lançamento Pedidos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh If &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() and &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - 30 &PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load RetornaNotaPedido.call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, 0, Status_EntradaSaida.Saida, &NfeNum, &NfeQtdVol, &NfePesBrt) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ActionRemoveDespacho = !'' &gridPedCliCodRaz = iif(PedCliCodRaz.Length() > 30, Substr(PedCliCodRaz,1,30)+'...', PedCliCodRaz) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ prcStatusPedidoRGB_Nome.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsFinCod, &NovoStatusFinanceiro, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatusFinanceiro.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) prcStatusPedidoRGB_Nome.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsCod, &NovoStatus, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatus.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) &Despacho = trim(DtoC(PedDtaDsp)) + ' ' + trim(PedHorDsp) if LctTip = TipoLancamento.DevolucaoCompra &PedTraRaz = trim(str(PedTraRedCod)) + ' - ' + trim(PedTraRedRaz) Else &PedTraRaz = trim(str(PedTraSaiCod)) + ' - ' + trim(PedTraSaiRaz) Endif EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ActionRemoveDespacho.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &FilCod_Selected = FilCod &PedCod_Selected = PedCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ActionRemoveDespacho.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ActionRemoveDespacho.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ActionRemoveDespacho.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do ActionRemoveDespacho' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcaDescmarca' For Each line in grid &IsSeleciona = true EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoDespachar' &sdtPedidos.Clear() For Each line in grid If &IsSeleciona = true &sdtPedidosItem = new() &sdtPedidosItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCliCodRaz = &gridPedCliCodRaz &sdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) EndIF EndFor if &sdtPedidos.Count > 0 &WebSession.Set('wpDespachar', &sdtPedidos.ToXml()) wpDespacharPedido.Popup() Refresh Else msg('Nenhum Pedido selecionado para despacho!') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'Dosdd' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpLocalizaNotaPedido.PopUp(&EmpCod, &Pedcod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWPedidoVendaDespacho.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWPedidoVendaDespacho.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod1.Visible = False &PedVenCod1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaEms1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaDsp1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaEms1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTADSP' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaDsp1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod2.Visible = False &PedVenCod2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaEms2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaDsp2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaEms2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTADSP' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaDsp2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod3.Visible = False &PedVenCod3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaEms3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaDsp3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaEms3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTADSP' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaDsp3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ActionRemoveDespacho' &auxPedDtaDsp.SetEmpty() &auxPedHorDsp.SetEmpty() GravaDataDespa.Call(&EmpCod_Selected, &FilCod_Selected, &PedCod_Selected, &auxPedDtaDsp, &auxPedHorDsp, &Context.PesCod, &Context.UserName) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSDSP" &PedStsDsp.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDTRASAICOD" &PedTraSaiCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDTRASAIRAZ" &PedTraSaiRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAFAT" &PedDtaFat.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaFat_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTATUSAL" &LctAtuSal.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDBLQ" &PedBlq.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAEMS' &PedDtaEms1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaEms_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTADSP' &PedDtaDsp1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaDsp_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTS", "", true, 0, &PedSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLICOD", "", not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTSDSP", "", not &PedStsDsp.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedStsDsp, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDTRASAICOD", "", not &PedTraSaiCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedTraSaiCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDTRASAIRAZ", "", not &PedTraSaiRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedTraSaiRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDDTAFAT", "", not (&PedDtaFat.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaFat_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PedDtaFat.ToString().Trim(), &PedDtaFat_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTTIP", "", not &LctTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTATUSAL", "", not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctAtuSal, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDBLQ", "", not &PedBlq.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedBlq, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAEMS' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaEms1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaEms_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTADSP' AND not (&PedDtaDsp1.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaDsp_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaDsp1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaDsp_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAEMS' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaEms2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaEms_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTADSP' AND not (&PedDtaDsp2.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaDsp_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaDsp2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaDsp_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAEMS' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaEms3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaEms_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTADSP' AND not (&PedDtaDsp3.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaDsp_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaDsp3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaDsp_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event 'DoActionRemoveDespacho' RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPEDIDOVENDADESPACHO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3, &AutNiv) If &AutNiv < 3 msg('Não autorizado ao Level 3 do Monitora Despacho de Pedidos!') Else EndiF EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
